name: TimeEmbedding
description: Sinusoidal time embedding for diffusion steps. Encodes step k via sin/cos at varying frequencies then projects via learned linear.
code:
_te{{_id}}_half = {{d_model}} // 2
_te{{_id}}_freqs = np.exp(-np.log(10000.0) * np.arange(_te{{_id}}_half, dtype=np.float32) / _te{{_id}}_half)
_te{{_id}}_args = float({{step}}) * _te{{_id}}_freqs
_te{{_id}}_sincos = np.concatenate([np.sin(_te{{_id}}_args), np.cos(_te{{_id}}_args)], axis=0).reshape(1, -1)
_te{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn({{d_model}}, {{d_model}}).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_te{{_id}}_b = np.zeros({{d_model}}, dtype=np.float32)
{{embedding}} = np.dot(_te{{_id}}_sincos, _te{{_id}}_W.T) + _te{{_id}}_b
